Classes/CameraDevice.html.name: CameraDevice
Classes/CameraDevice.html.abstract: CameraDevice provides access to the phone camera module.

Classes/Camera.html.name: Camera
Classes/Camera.html.abstract: Camera input takes frames from CameraDevice and pushes them into the realtime processor.

Classes/Photo.html.name: Photo
Classes/Photo.html.abstract: Photo input takes photo from CameraDevice or Image and pushes it into the photo processor.

Classes/Stream.html.name: Stream
Classes/Stream.html.abstract: Stream input provides ability to push BNBFrameData or CVPixelBuffer into the video processor.

Classes/Frame.html.name: Frame
Classes/Frame.html.abstract: Frame output presents provided OffscreenRenderTarget into the generic frame: UIImage, RenderedFrame, CIImage.

Classes/PixelBuffer.html.name: PixelBuffer
Classes/PixelBuffer.html.abstract: PixelBuffer output presents provided OffscreenRenderTarget into the CVPixelBuffer with defined orientation.

Classes/PixelBufferYUV.html.name: PixelBufferYUV
Classes/PixelBufferYUV.html.abstract: PixelBufferYUV output presents provided OffscreenRenderTarget into the CVPixelBuffer with defined pixelFormatType and orientation.

Classes/Video.html.name: Video
Classes/Video.html.abstract: Video output presents provided OffscreenRenderTarget into the video file.

Classes/Player.html.name: Player
Classes/Player.html.abstract: Player uses input to take processed frames, draw effect and present them into the outputs.

Classes/MulticastDelegate.html.name: MulticastDelegate
Classes/MulticastDelegate.html.abstract: Provides ability to add/remove several observers for generic events

Classes/WatermarkInfo.html.name: WatermarkInfo
Classes/WatermarkInfo.html.abstract: Watermark placement coulb be configured by normalized position (0..1 for x, y based on final pixel buffer size),
